steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Given $8 + x = 5$, rewrite the target expression: $56 + 7x = 7(8 + x)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $35$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $35$ is the value to enter.
